backend.changelog: Durable one-click update: the host updater now reads the live compose set, always reports a real result (no more stuck 'downloading'), and self-recovers from token/overlay drift. After updating, a one-time host step refreshes the helper (see release notes).

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
